stemHtml: A light aircraft with call sign F-EAVX is flying outside of Lille approach's radio range. Lille approach requests another aircraft with call sign Fastair 144 to relay the change of communications to Paris control on 128.10. Which of the following transmissions from Fastair 144 is correct?

options.b: Fastair 144, relaying Lille approach for F-EAVX , contact Paris control 128.10.
options.d: Fastair 144, relaying Lille Approach for F-EAVX , call Paris control 128.10.
